ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Answer To Verified Petition Filed By Defendant And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Bassin, Esq. 415-753-5245, appearing via court call for Bower Family Partner, Defendant and opposing party.

No other appearances.

Hearing Held. Mr. Bassin stated that the cost of transfer involving real estate should be paid by the plaintiff.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF QUEEN OF THE LIGHT ANDERSON'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Answer To Verified Petition Filed By Defendant And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration is denied. Defendants are required to provided payment of transfer fees and completion of transfer. Court to prepare a form of order. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Continued To Mar-27-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
